instruction: Outline a method to mitigate this type of vulnerability.
input: Dynamic Transaction Queuing System v1.0 was discovered to contain a SQL injection vulnerability via the id parameter at /admin/ajax.php?action=delete_window.
output: To mitigate SQL Injection vulnerabilities, implement input validation, use prepared statements with parameterized queries, and employ web application firewalls (WAFs) to filter malicious inputs.
